mapper.sql: id, resume_id, candidate_name, position_id, position_name, interview_time, interview_location, interviewer_id, interviewer_name, interview_type, status, score, advantages, disadvantages, suggestion, evaluation, attachment_url, notify_status, notify_content, create_time, update_time, create_by, remark
mapper.insert: insert into interview (id, resume_id, candidate_name, position_id, position_name, interview_time, interview_location, interviewer_id, interviewer_name, interview_type, status, score, advantages, disadvantages, suggestion, evaluation, attachment_url, notify_status, notify_content, create_by, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{interviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interviewerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{interviewerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interviewType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{score,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{advantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disadvantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suggestion,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{evaluation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notifyStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{notifyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into interview
resume_id,
candidate_name,
position_id,
position_name,
interview_time,
interview_location,
interviewer_id,
interviewer_name,
interview_type,
status,
score,
advantages,
disadvantages,
suggestion,
evaluation,
attachment_url,
notify_status,
notify_content,
create_by,
remark,
#{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.update:
update interview
resume_id = #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
candidate_name = #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
position_id = #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
position_name = #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
interview_time = #{interviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
interview_location = #{interviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
interviewer_id = #{interviewerId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
interviewer_name = #{interviewerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
interview_type = #{interviewType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
score = #{score,jdbcType=INTEGER},
advantages = #{advantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
disadvantages = #{disadvantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
suggestion = #{suggestion,jdbcType=TINYINT},
evaluation = #{evaluation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notify_status = #{notifyStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
notify_content = #{notifyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update interview set resume_id = #{resumeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, candidate_name = #{candidateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position_id = #{positionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, position_name = #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, interview_time = #{interviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, interview_location = #{interviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, interviewer_id = #{interviewerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, interviewer_name = #{interviewerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, interview_type = #{interviewType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, score = #{score,jdbcType=INTEGER}, advantages = #{advantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disadvantages = #{disadvantages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, suggestion = #{suggestion,jdbcType=TINYINT}, evaluation = #{evaluation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notify_status = #{notifyStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, notify_content = #{notifyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into interview (resume_id, candidate_name, position_id, position_name, interview_time, interview_location, interviewer_id, interviewer_name, interview_type, status, create_by, remark) values
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.candidateName}, #{item.positionId}, #{item.positionName}, #{item.interviewTime}, #{item.interviewLocation}, #{item.interviewerId}, #{item.interviewerName}, #{item.interviewType}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select:
select
from interview where resume_id = #{resumeId} order by interview_time desc

select position_name as positionName, count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as passCount, sum(case when status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as failCount from interview where interview_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by position_id, position_name
